step2.customerArchetype: Small studio teams who need a brand system they can actually maintain across channels
step2.painPoints: Visuals and messaging drift every quarter; nothing feels owned or repeatable
step2.desiredOutcomes: One brand system the whole team picks up and applies without re-asking the studio every time

step4.missionStatement: Build brand systems independent teams can run on their own.

step5.originSummary: Started as a two-person studio frustrated by hand-off brands that fell apart in production.
step5.motivation: Wanted to ship systems clients actually used, not decks they archived.

step7.differentiation: Small enough to stay on the project; structured enough to leave the team a system they can own.
